auth_secure_login: Secure login with your Mines account
auth_maintenance_default: Canari is under maintenance. Only administrators can sign in.
auth_pin_min_length: The PIN must be at least 4 characters.
auth_pin_setup_p1: This PIN encrypts all your messages. It is
auth_pin_setup_p2: and cannot be recovered if you forget it.
auth_pin_keep_safe: Write it down and keep it safe.
auth_pin_unlock_desc: Enter your PIN to unlock end-to-end encryption. This PIN is the same on all your devices.
auth_pin_hint_returning: Enter the PIN you chose on your first sign-in.
auth_pin_hint_setup_long: At least 4 digits or characters of your choice.
auth_pin_recover_link: My PIN changed on another device → Recover my messages
auth_pin_reset_mid: keeps your account, your posts and the community, but
auth_pin_reset_strong2: permanently erases your encrypted message history
auth_pin_reset_end: . You will be re-invited to your conversations.
auth_pin_reset_confirm: Confirm - erase my messages and reset
auth_changepin_min_length: The new PIN must be at least 4 characters.
auth_changepin_mismatch: The new PIN and its confirmation do not match.
auth_changepin_diff_old: The new PIN must be different from the old one.
auth_changepin_diff_current: The new PIN must be different from the current one.
auth_changepin_recover_p1: Your PIN was changed on another device. Enter your
auth_changepin_recover_p3: to recover all your messages without losing anything.
auth_changepin_change_p1: The PIN encrypts all your messages and is
auth_changepin_change_reconnect: other devices will need to reconnect
auth_changepin_change_p3: with the new PIN (fingerprint will need to be re-enrolled).
auth_biometric_desc: Confirm your identity with your fingerprint or Face ID.
